base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hud_1up_high_score_labels — a ui (hud_readout) from 1981 galaga. Three HUD labels: '1UP' (red), 'HIGH SCORE' (red), '2UP' (red). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Three HUD labels: '1UP' (red), 'HIGH SCORE' (red), '2UP' (red); permanently at top of screen during gameplay
